title: cyperus curvistylis
intro: Cyperus curvistylis, also known as the curved-styled umbrella sedge or umbrella sedge, is a species of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyperus curvistylis include treating fever, respiratory issues, and digestive problems, as well as providing relief from pain and inflammation. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or poultices, and it is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
